mapper.insert: INSERT INTO correction_report (related_source_id, description, contact, reporter_ip, created_by) VALUES (#{relatedSourceId}, #{description}, #{contact}, #{reporterIp}, #{createdBy})
mapper.select: SELECT id, related_source_id AS relatedSourceId, description, contact, status, resolution_note AS resolutionNote, reporter_ip AS reporterIp, created_at AS createdAt FROM correction_report WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted=0

SELECT id, related_source_id AS relatedSourceId, description, contact, status, resolution_note AS resolutionNote, reporter_ip AS reporterIp, created_at AS createdAt FROM correction_report WHERE deleted=0 AND status=#{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
